debug_info.goal:
C✝ : Type u
inst✝² : Category.{v, u} C✝
J : GrothendieckTopology C✝
inst✝¹ : @CategoryTheory.GrothendieckTopology.IsLocallyConnectedSite C✝ inst✝² J
C : Type u
inst✝ : Category.{v, u} C
⊢ PreservesFiniteProducts colim

failed_attempts:
apply preservesFiniteProducts_of_preservesBinary_and_terminal
  · apply preservesTerminal_of_iso
    exact (Types.colimitTermIso _ inferInstance).symm
  · intro F G
    letI : Functor.Final (diagonal C) := IsSifted.final _
    apply preservesBinaryProduct_of_iso
    refine ?_ ≪≫ (Final.colimitIso (diagonal C) (F ⋙ Prod.fst ⨯ G ⋙ Prod.snd)).symm
    · apply colimit.mapIso
      exact NatIso.ofComponents (fun _ ↦ Iso.refl _) (by simp)
    · exact Limits.prod_colimit_iso F G

have : PreservesFiniteLimits (colim : (C ⥤ Type max u w) ⥤ _) :=
    preservesFiniteLimits_of_isSifted _ _
  inferInstance

have := IsSifted.nonempty
  have := IsSifted.diagonal_final
  exact preservesFiniteProducts_of_preservesBinaryProducts_of_preservesTerminal _
    (fun _ _ ↦ preservesBinaryProductsOfFinalDiagonal _ _ _)
    (preservesTerminalOfNonempty _)

refine preservesFiniteProducts_of_preservesBinary_and_terminal _ _ ?_ ?_
  · exact preservesTerminal_of_iso _ <| (colimit.isColimit _).coconePointUniqueUpToIso <|
      colimitLimitToLimitColimitTerminal _ IsSifted.nonempty
  · intro F G
    refine preservesBinary_of_iso _ <| (colimit.precompose <| eqToIso ?_).symm ≪≫
      (Final.colimitIso (Functor.diag C) (F.prod G)).symm ≪≫ Types.colimitProdIso F G
    apply Functor.ext; · intro; rfl; · intro _ _ _; simp; rfl

have : Nonempty C := IsSifted.nonempty C
  have : Functor.Final (Functor.diag C) := IsSifted.final_diagonal C
  refine preservesFiniteProducts_of_preservesBinaryProducts_of_preservesTerminal _ (fun F G ↦ ?_) (fun _ ↦ ?_)
  · let P : C × C ⥤ _ := { obj := fun X ↦ F.obj X.1 × G.obj X.2, map := fun f ↦ Prod.map (F.map f.1) (G.map f.2) }
    have : Functor.diag C ⋙ P = F ⨯ G := Functor.ext (fun _ ↦ rfl) (fun _ ↦ rfl)
    refine IsIso.of_iso <| (Types.colimitEquivColimitProd F G).toIso.trans <|
      (Final.colimitIso (Functor.diag C) P).symm.trans (HasColimit.isoOfNatIso this).symm
  · apply (Types.colimitConstTerminal _).isIso_hom

refine preservesFiniteProducts_of_preservesBinaryAndTerminal _ _ ?_ ?_
  · exact preservesTerminal_of_iso _ (colimitConstIso _)
  · refine preservesBinaryProducts_of_preservesBinaryProduct _ fun F G ↦ ?_
    exact preservesBinaryProduct_of_iso _ _ (IsSifted.colimitProdIso F G)

let e : Type max u w ≌ Type v := Types.uliftEquiv.{v, max u w}.symm
  have : PreservesFiniteProducts (colim : (C ⥤ Type v) ⥤ _) := inferInstance
  exact preservesFiniteProductsOfNatIso (Adjunction.leftAdjointUniq (colimitAdj _)
    (e.toAdjunction.comp (colimitAdj _ |>.comp (Adjunction.whiskerRight e.toAdjunction _))))

preservesFiniteProducts_of_preservesBinaryProducts_of_preservesTerminal _ _
    (PreservesTerminal.of_iso _ <| colimitConstIso (⊤_ _))
    (PreservesBinaryProducts.of_iso _ fun F G ↦
      (Final.colimitIso (IsSifted.final_diag C) (F.prod' G)).symm ≪≫
      (Types.colimitProdIso F G).symm)

have : Functor.Final (diag C) := IsSifted.final_diagonal
  have : IsConnected C := IsSifted.isConnected
  preservesFiniteProducts_of_preservesBinaryProducts_of_preservesTerminal _
    (preservesBinaryProductsOfFinal (diag C))
    (preservesTerminalOfIsConnected C)
